title: alsolinum maritimum
intro: Alsolinum maritimum, also known as Sea Wormwood, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote skin healing. Alsolinum maritimum can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
